race.comment: MINSTREL NZ (5) has placed twice in this race and is as reliable as they come with a long string of wins and placings including a WA Cup win late last year. Built off a resuming second to arch rival Magnificent Storm to win from a wide barrier here last start. Kept fresh but has been targeting this so is sure to be peaking. MAGNIFICENT STORM NZ (4) is flying having won all five starts since a WA Cup second to Minstrel from a wide draw and he beat that rival in last month's Pinjarra Cup. Led from much wider to win last week's Governors Cup so expect him to push forward. Huge chance. Last-start Melton winner BULLETPROOF BOY (8) has been taking on the big guns in the east this season, highlighted by wins in the Bendigo Cup and Newcastle Mile. Draws wide but has a devastating sprint. MAX DELIGHT (3) hasn't been far away from tough draws of late and is better served by this barrier. UBETCHA TIGERPIE (10) draws on the back row but was very tough in winning the Renshaw Cup from there last start.
